name: evelodb-prime
description: A high-performance native B-tree database for Node.js. Made by Evelocore. With B-tree Operations.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:cjs && npm run build:esm
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.build:esm: tsc -p tsconfig.json --module esnext --outDir dist/esm && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.writeFileSync('dist/esm/package.json', JSON.stringify({ type: 'module' }));"

author: Evelocore
